summary: A 6-second silent text-card graphic from the '#12DaysofTips' series advising green card holders traveling with an expiring card to keep their updated I-90 receipt notice, over an animated snowflake and DHS-seal background. The graphic has no audio and no music.
notable_text: TODAY'S TIP: IF TRAVELING WITH AN EXPIRING GREEN CARD, KEEP YOUR UPDATED I-90 RECEIPT NOTICE; #12DaysofTips
